title: Entity Spawn On Death
description: Component for spawning entities when an entity perishes.

additional_spawn_range.title: Additional Spawn Range
additional_spawn_range.description: Additional random range of entities to spawn, defaults to 0, 0 when not set

entity_to_spawn.title: Entity To Spawn
entity_to_spawn.description: What entity to spawn, defaults to owning entity when not set

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.description: Conditions that need to be met for the behavior to start.

inherit_parent_name.title: Inherit Parent Name
inherit_parent_name.description: If true, the entity will inherit the name of the parent entity, defaults to true when not set

spawn_amount.title: Spawn Amount
spawn_amount.description: How many entities to spawn, defaults to 1 when not set

spawn_method.title: Spawn Method
spawn_method.description: Spawn method. born, spawned, or summoned, defaults to spawned when not set
